[[Secretary/Legends|Secretary]] '''Lai-O-Sid''' was a [[Tiss'shar]].

==Biography==
An eligible candidate for the position of [[President of the Tiss'sharl League|President]] of the [[Tiss'sharl League]], he was assassinated by order of the ambitious [[Geor-Dan-Thi]] who sought to remove his opponents for the Presidency.

{{Char-stub}}
